3338080.name: Juice factory
3338080.description:
Imagine a bustling city where every single citizen is a sloth – goofy, cute, but also surprisingly hard-working. In the creation of their favorite Juice, you step into the shoes (paws?) of a sloth entrepreneur trying to take over the city's juice market. It's a lighthearted economic simulation meets multiplayer strategy game where you run your own juice business and compete with others to become the top juice tycoon in town.

What you can expect:

Build your juice empire
Start with a small investment or a farm. Strategize where to place your factory to gain an advantage over your rivals. Manage your fruit supply, upgrade your equipment, and keep sloth customers happy (and hydrated).

Multiplayer market competition
You can compete against real players or play solo against NPC investors. Form alliances, sabotage competitors, or launch over-the-top marketing campaigns to dominate the sloth market.

Cartoonish, humorous style
Expect silly sloth characters in business suits, pun-filled dialogue, and goofy animations. The game’s light-hearted tone is designed to make you laugh while you strategize.
